text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the G1 race that determines the
medium-distance champion of the spring season!
It's the Osaka Hai! And it's about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I have heard about Chiyono O's circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: With that in mind, allow me to say this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Let's make this the finest battle imaginable.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes. A race that takes us beyond our limits!
